title: gw1-mcp — MCP usage
description: Anonymous per-tool usage of the gw1-mcp worker (Workers Analytics Engine dataset gw1_mcp_usage; tool NAME only, never arguments). Queries always SUM(_sample_interval) — never COUNT() — because Analytics Engine samples. Retention: 90 days.

panels.title: Calls per tool (selected range)
panels.description: Which tools carry the usage. tool:* labels only.

targets.query: SELECT blob1 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%' GROUP BY label ORDER BY calls DESC
targets.rawQuery: SELECT blob1 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%' GROUP BY label ORDER BY calls DESC

panels.title: Tool calls vs protocol overhead
panels.description: initialize / resource reads vs actual tool work.

targets.query: SELECT if(blob1 LIKE 'tool:%', 'tool calls', 'protocol') AS kind, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY kind
targets.rawQuery: SELECT if(blob1 LIKE 'tool:%', 'tool calls', 'protocol') AS kind, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY kind

panels.title: Daily calls per tool
panels.description: The trend line — the panel to watch after the Reddit post.

targets.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL '1' DAY) AS t, blob1 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%' GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t
targets.rawQuery: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL '1' DAY) AS t, blob1 AS label, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter AND blob1 LIKE 'tool:%' GROUP BY t, label ORDER BY t

panels.title: Hourly pulse (zoom the range to 48h)
panels.description: All RPC traffic per hour — spikes = launch moments.

targets.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL '1' HOUR) AS t, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.rawQuery: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL '1' HOUR) AS t, SUM(_sample_interval) AS calls FROM gw1_mcp_usage WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
